visual_description: A man in a dark suit and tie stands in front of a glowing digital display showing phone numbers and a map. He holds a small device in his hands, looking down at it intently. The background screen displays text like "DETECT GSM900 52 SELECT CELL" and a grid-like map with highlighted areas.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a high pitch and moderate loudness, speaking at a moderate pace. There are no noticeable non-speech sounds or prosodic variations.
